name: TestMostWriteReg
title: TestMostWriteReg
syntax: long TestMostWriteReg(long aChannel, long aChip, dword aOffset, dword aRegDataLen, BYTE aRegData[], unsigned long aTimeout);
description: Writes one or several chip registers in the MOST hardware and waits for the result. If the operational is successful, the written register values can be read out using TestMostRegGetData.

parameters.name: aChip
parameters.description: MOST hardware chip ID. Possible values are: 1 : OS814 (other chips cannot be accessed as of yet)

parameters.name: aRegDataLen
parameters.description: Number of registers to be read (maximum 16 bytes with VN2600/VN2610).

parameters.name: aRegData[]
parameters.description: Data buffer with data to write (minimum size aRegDataLen)

parameters.name: aTimeout
parameters.description: Maximum time that should be waited [ms] (Transmission of 0: no timeout monitoring; test module waits infinitely long)

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
